snapshot.description:
- Update examination_form_screen.dart to capture and save all clinical fields.
- Refactor blood_test_prescription_screen.dart to remove non-model fields and implement atomic creation of TestOrder and Sample.
- Map TestOrderStatus.pending to 'Chờ chỉ định' on all UI components.
- Enhance history_tab.dart to display full examination details in expanded view.
- Ensure adherence to existing models (TestOrderModel, SampleModel, ExaminationModel) without structural changes.
snapshot.title: Finalize Clinician Examination and Prescription Workflow

newValue.text: examination_form_screen.dart saves all 13 fields correctly to Firestore via Cubit.
blood_test_prescription_screen.dart removed 'Test Type' and 'Sample Type' fields to match models.
blood_test_prescription_screen.dart creates both TestOrder and Sample atomically in Firestore.
TestOrderStatus.pending is mapped to 'Chờ chỉ định' on all relevant UI screens.
history_tab.dart displays all detailed clinical fields in the expanded view.
